evals.name: temporal-workflow-engine
evals.prompt: How does Temporal work? Explain its basics — activities, workflows, etc.
evals.expected_output: A layman + analogy explanation of Temporal that is grounded in the real terms (Workflow, Activity, Worker, Task Queue, durable execution, event history/replay). Intuition AND real vocabulary woven together, not segregated.
assertions: Opens with a plain-language one-sentence statement of what Temporal is
Includes a concrete analogy (e.g. chef / notebook / recipe)
Names the real core terms: Workflow, Activity, Worker, Task Queue
Explains the durability mechanism: Event History and Replay
Mentions the determinism constraint on Workflows
Explicitly calls out where the analogy breaks down
Closes with actionable payoff / canonical search terms

evals.name: nextjs-what-and-when
evals.prompt: Explain what is Next.js and when would I use it.
evals.expected_output: A grounded explanation of Next.js (React framework) with real terms (SSR, SSG, App Router/Pages Router, server components, file-based routing) plus concrete when-to-use guidance, in approachable language.
assertions: States up front that Next.js is a React framework, in plain language
Includes a concrete analogy (engine/car or kitchen/restaurant)
Names real rendering strategies (SSR and SSG)
Names routing + component model terms (App Router, Server Components, file-based routing)
Provides concrete when-to-use AND when-not-to-use guidance
Closes with actionable payoff / vocabulary recap

evals.name: js-multithreading
evals.expected_output: A grounded answer to a nuanced yes/no: JS execution is single-threaded (one call stack, event loop), but concurrency exists via async, and real parallelism via Web Workers / Worker threads. Real terms anchored to plain-language intuition.
assertions: Gives a clear nuanced answer up front (single-threaded core, but...)
Names the event loop + call stack mechanism
Names real parallelism APIs: Web Workers and Node worker_threads
Includes a concrete analogy (e.g. chef / kitchen)
Closes with actionable payoff / search terms
